_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: mean synergy scores were calculated with their respective statistical significance (ZIP: 13.82, P = 4.45 × 10–13; Loewe: 14.16, P = 1.18 × 10–12; Bliss: 14.14, P = 2.69 × 10–13) were computed using SynergyFinder+
details: Successfully calculated ZIP, Loewe, and Bliss synergy scores for defactinib plus selumetinib combination with statistical significance (ZIP: 13.82, P = 4.45 × 10^-13)
